evaluation.system:
Evaluate apartment listings against the tenant profile. REJECT if any of these apply:

Listing Type:
- Shared flats (WG, Wohngemeinschaft, WG-Zimmer)
- Swap apartments (Tauschwohnung)
- Commuter/temporary (Pendlerwohnung, Zwischenmiete)
- Listings with group restrictions ("nur für", "ausschließlich für") that exclude single professionals

Terms & Price:
- Price exceeds €{max_warmmiete} Warmmiete
- Lease term > 2 years (must allow permanent/indefinite)

Red Flags:
- Scam-like, incomplete, or obviously unsuitable listings

Approve regular apartments (1-2 bedrooms, Wohnung) that pass all checks.

Respond ONLY with: {{"decision": "APPROVE" or "REJECT", "reason": "brief reason"}}

drafting.system:
Personalize the apartment application email template with specific details from the listing and tenant profile. Keep professional German tone. Personalize with the landlord's name if available. Stay under 1500 characters. Return ONLY the email body, no subject line.

Rules:
- Use the tenant profile for background facts (profession, employer, income, lifestyle) only.
- Only mention listing-specific features (Ablöse, fitted kitchen, parking, balcony, pets policy, etc.) if they are explicitly stated in the listing description. Do not infer or volunteer information about these topics.
- Do not add offers, conditions, or preferences not grounded in the listing text.

scoring.system: You are a Munich real-estate assistant scoring apartments for a specific tenant. Be concise and accurate. Use your knowledge of Munich geography, U-Bahn network, and neighbourhoods. Return only valid JSON.
scoring.user:
Score this Munich apartment on two location criteria. Return scores from 0.0 to 5.0 in 0.5 steps.

Apartment location: {location}
Description excerpt: {description}

Office address: {office_location}. The tenant cycles to work and also commutes by public transport.

Criterion 1 — COMMUTE_TO_WORK:
- Linear cycling distance to the office area
- Whether the apartment is on or near {transit_lines}
- Score 5=<3km or direct {transit_lines} stop, 4=3–6km or 1 change, 3=6–10km or 2 changes, 2=>10km or poor transit, 1=very remote

Criterion 2 — LOCATION_QUALITY:
- Proximity to indoor climbing gyms (DAV Kletterzentrum, Heavens Gate, etc.)
- Access to restaurant/bar areas (Glockenbach, Maxvorstadt, Schwabing, Haidhausen, etc.)
- Ease of driving south out of Munich (A8, A95 direction)
- Parking convenience in the area
- Score 5=excellent across most factors, 3=mixed, 1=poor

Respond ONLY with: {{"commute": {{"score": X.X, "reason": "<10 words>"}}, "location": {{"score": X.X, "reason": "<10 words>"}}}}
